issues.detail: The skill only demonstrates happy path examples and does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes Docker and specific OS compatibility, limiting use on other platforms.

scenarios.name: Hybrid search on an Article collection with category filter
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses articles.query.hybrid with alpha and articles.filter.byProperty('category').equal('tech') from the v4 client; baseline writes generic GraphQL or hand-rolled BM25+vector merging.

scenarios.name: Create schema with text2vec-openai vectorizer and run backup via REST
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses client.collections.create with weaviate.configure.vectorizer.text2VecOpenAI and POSTs to /v1/backups/filesystem with the documented payload; baseline gives generic schema design and misses the backups REST shape.
